regulation_reference: SEBI ICDR Regulations 2018, Chapter IX, Schedule VI, Part A, Clauses 4 & 5
description: Disclosure of the capital structure of the company including details of authorized, issued, subscribed and paid-up share capital, and the shareholding pattern of promoters and promoter group.

shareholder_name.label: Shareholder Name
shareholder_name.help_text: Full legal name of the shareholder.

category.label: Shareholder Category
category.icdr_text: Category of the shareholder as defined under Regulation 2(1)(oo) and 2(1)(pp) of SEBI ICDR.
category.help_text: Category under SEBI regulations — Promoter, Promoter Group, or Public.

number_of_shares.label: Number of Equity Shares
number_of_shares.help_text: Total number of equity shares held by this shareholder.

percentage_holding.label: Percentage Holding (%)
percentage_holding.icdr_text: Percentage of equity shares held in relation to the total paid-up capital.
percentage_holding.help_text: Shareholding as a percentage of total paid-up capital.

date_of_acquisition.label: Date of Acquisition / Allotment
date_of_acquisition.icdr_text: Date on which shares were acquired or allotted and the price at which such shares were acquired.
date_of_acquisition.help_text: Date when the shares were acquired or allotted.

acquisition_price_per_share.label: Acquisition Price per Share (₹)
acquisition_price_per_share.icdr_text: Price at which such shares were acquired.
acquisition_price_per_share.help_text: Price paid per equity share at the time of acquisition.

notes: Promoter shareholding must be disclosed both pre-issue and post-issue.
Lock-in requirements: Minimum promoters' contribution of 20% of post-issue capital is locked in for 3 years (Regulation 236).
All changes in shareholding in the last 3 years must be disclosed with consideration details.
